entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop that is the primary host for the wilt pathogen Fusarium udum

entities.name: WILT
entities.description: A disease symptom characterized by the loss of turgidity and drooping of the plant

entities.name: FUSARIUM UDUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen known to cause wilt in pigeonpea

entities.name: WEED SPECIES
entities.description: Various non-crop plant species collected and tested for the presence of Fusarium udum

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop that exhibited leaf drying and defoliation when grown in wilt-sick plots

entities.name: LEAF DRYING
entities.description: A symptom of plant stress or disease observed on cotton plants

entities.name: DEFOLIATION
entities.description: The premature loss of leaves observed on cotton plants
